text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Listen to this, McQueen! The shop I work
part-time at just started selling a sweet treat I bet
you'd love!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh my! It must be good if it's received your approval. And where might this sweets shop be?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Heh heh heh... Actually, it's at the baseball
stadium! They made a new crepe that's supposed
to look just like a baseball field! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, I know the exact one! I saw it last week
while perusing the sto...res...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Ahhh! I should've guessed you'd already know it! So you were in the stadiu—gasp!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(Oh no! What have I done?! I knew she was
secretly going to ball games, but I was pretending
I didn't notice!)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
So the crepes at the stadium are so popular that
the stores near school started selling them too?
W-wow! Kind of makes me proud to be working
there!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Er... Yes, precisely! Obviously I would never have
any reason to go all the way to the stores at the
stadium! Your sweets must be getting really
popular!
